query:
Research the company "delmontefoods".

Research the prospect's company to find: (1) Most recent quarterly earnings report and any P&L misses, revenue shortfalls, or guidance changes; (2) CEO succession or leadership changes within the last 12 months; (3) Announced strategic reviews, transformation programs, or operational efficiency initiatives; (4) Recent product launches, platform expansions, or new market entries; (5) Production/manufacturing growth rates or capacity expansion announcements; (6) Cost-cutting programs or operational restructuring; (7) Supply chain, distribution, or pricing strategy changes; (8) Any public commentary on cross-functional alignment or operational challenges; (9) Company scale (revenue, employee count, Fortune ranking if applicable).

Focus on the last 6 months. Return a comprehensive summary with specific facts, numbers, and dates.
answer:
**Executive Summary**
Del Monte Foods Corporation II Inc. recently underwent a Chapter 11 bankruptcy, resulting in a court-approved joint wind-down and the strategic sale of its assets to three separate buyers—Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc., B&G Foods, and Pacific Coast Producers—in March 2026. Concurrently, acquirer Fresh Del Monte reported a Q1 2026 earnings miss with net income falling 68% year-over-year, though the company projects strong full-year sales growth driven by the integration of the newly acquired Del Monte Foods assets. 

**Bankruptcy, Restructuring, and Asset Sales**
Del Monte Foods Corporation II Inc. has ceased operating as a standalone entity following a court-supervised Chapter 11 bankruptcy process. On May 22, 2026, the U.S. Bankruptcy Court confirmed a plan for a joint wind-down of the company rather than a reorganization [Del Monte Foods Bankruptcy: Plan Confirmed After $509M Sale and Wind-Down](https://elevenflo.com/blog/del-monte-foods-bankruptcy). 

Prior to the confirmation, on March 19, 2026, the company completed the sale of substantially all of its business segments [Del Monte Foods completes sale of all business segments By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/company-news/del-monte-foods-completes-sale-of-all-business-segments-93CH-4571805). The assets were divided among three buyers:
*   **Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. (FDP):** Acquired select assets for a cash consideration of approximately $308 million to $310.2 million (noted in some releases as ~$285 million) to enhance operational efficiency and cost structure [Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. Reports First Quarter Earnings for Fiscal 2026](https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1047340/000104734026000023/may52026-earningspr.htm); [Fresh Del Monte Completes Acquisition of Select Del Monte® Foods Assets](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260319052538/en/Fresh-Del-Monte-Completes-Acquisition-of-Select-Del-Monte-Foods-Assets).
*   **Pacific Coast Producers:** Acquired the rights and licenses for the Del Monte and S&W brands for shelf-stable packaged ambient fruit and sauces in the U.S. and Mexico [Del Monte Foods to sell core businesses | Food Business News](https://www.foodbusinessnews.net/articles/29628-del-monte-foods-to-sell-core-businesses).
*   **B&G Foods:** Acquired the broth and stock operations, including the College Inn and Kitchen Basics brands, in Q1 2026 [Del Monte Foods - Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Del_Monte_Foods).

Leading up to the bankruptcy, Del Monte Foods also executed a strategic exit from its Mann Packing business in December 2025 [Del Monte Foods Completes Strategic Acquisition to Bolster 2026 Portfolio](https://www.harianbasis.co/en/del-monte-foods-acquisition-strategic-integration-2026).

**Financial Performance & Guidance (Q1 2026)**
Because Del Monte Foods' assets were acquired by Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. (FDP), FDP's Q1 2026 earnings reflect the immediate financial impact of the transaction:
*   **P&L Misses:** FDP reported Q1 2026 adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.63, missing analyst forecasts of $0.82 by 23.17% [Earnings call transcript: Fresh Del Monte’s Q1 2026 misses EPS forecast By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-fresh-del-montes-q1-2026-misses-eps-forecast-93CH-4660171). Revenue was $1.04 billion, slightly missing expectations of $1.05 billion [Earnings call transcript: Fresh Del Monte’s Q1 2026 misses EPS forecast By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-fresh-del-montes-q1-2026-misses-eps-forecast-93CH-4660171). Net income fell 68% year-over-year to $10 million, down from $31.1 million in Q1 2025 [Fresh Del Monte Produce Earnings Q1 2026 - Report | FDP News & Analysis](https://www.panabee.com/news/fresh-del-monte-produce-earnings-q1-2026-report).
*   **Debt Impact:** FDP's long-term debt and finance leases surged to $451.5 million as of March 27, 2026 (up from $176.2 million at the end of 2025), primarily to fund the Del Monte Foods acquisition [Fresh Del Monte Q1 2026 results, Del Monte deal | FDP Quarterly Report (10-Q)](https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/FDP/10-q-fresh-del-monte-produce-inc-quarterly-earnings-report-ce34c2ff899e.html).
*   **Guidance Changes:** FDP projects full-year 2026 net sales growth of 13% to 15%. The newly acquired Del Monte Foods assets are expected to contribute $600 million in net sales and add approximately $23 million to FDP's adjusted EBITDA for the full year [Fresh Del Monte forecasts 13%-15% 2026 net sales growth as Del Monte Foods adds $600M amid $40M-$45M cost pressure](https://www.msn.com/en-us/money/companies/fresh-del-monte-forecasts-13-15-2026-net-sales-growth-as-del-monte-foods-adds-600m-amid-40m-45m-cost-pressure/ar-AA22sPDr?ocid=finance-verthp-feeds); [Fresh Del Monte (FDP) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript | The Motley Fool](https://www.fool.com/earnings/call-transcripts/2026/05/05/fresh-del-monte-fdp-q1-2026-earnings-transcript/).

*Note on related entities:* Del Monte Pacific Limited (DMPL) reported Q1 2026 sales of $203.7 million (a 13% increase) but was suspended from trading on the Philippine Stock Exchange in September 2025 due to a lapse in filing its annual report [Del Monte Pacific Limited (DMPLF) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript | Seeking Alpha](https://seekingalpha.com/article/4822075-del-monte-pacific-limited-dmplf-q1-2026-earnings-call-transcript); [Del Monte Pacific’s Competitors, Revenue, Number of Employees, Funding, Acquisitions & News - Owler Company Profile](https://www.owler.com/company/delmontepacific).

**Operational Efficiency, Supply Chain, and Restructuring**
Following the bankruptcy and asset sales, significant operational restructuring has occurred:
*   **Facility Closures:** Del Monte Foods announced the closure of its Modesto and Hughson plants in April 2026 as part of an orderly wind-down [Del Monte bankruptcy shutter Calif. plants, with $550M in farm losses](https://www.sfgate.com/bayarea/article/del-monte-modesto-plant-closure-21953566.php). The company also shut down its major warehouses in California in April 2026 [Del Monte Foods - Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Del_Monte_Foods).
*   **Integration Strategy:** Fresh Del Monte is utilizing a "light-touch" integration strategy for the acquired foods division to preserve its agility and customer focus [Fresh Del Monte CEO outlines 2026 strategy and Del Monte Foods acquisition | Fruitnet](https://www.fruitnet.com/eurofruit/fresh-del-monte-ceo-outlines-strategic-vision-for-2026/270634.article). FDP has realigned its reporting into four segments, creating a new "Prepared Foods" segment that merges the acquired Del Monte Foods businesses with existing operations [Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. Reports First Quarter Earnings for Fiscal 2026](https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1047340/000104734026000023/may52026-earningspr.htm). 
*   **Strategic Alignment:** The strategic intent under FDP's ownership is to align fresh and shelf-stable foods under a single, globally integrated strategy to expand presence across both the store perimeter and center aisles [Fresh Del Monte Selected as Successful Bidder in Del Monte Foods Court-Supervised Sale | Fresh Del Monte](https://freshdelmonte.com/news/fresh-del-monte-selected-as-successful-bidder-in-del-monte-foods-court-supervised-sale/).
*   **Supply Chain & Pricing:** To optimize logistics, a previously leased warehouse in Wisconsin was purchased to improve global asset utilization [Del Monte Foods Completes Strategic Acquisition to Bolster 2026 Portfolio](https://www.harianbasis.co/en/del-monte-foods-acquisition-strategic-integration-2026). However, geopolitical disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz are projected to increase FDP's costs by $40 million to $45 million starting in Q2 2026. To mitigate this, the company is implementing targeted pricing actions and contractual fuel recovery mechanisms [Earnings call transcript: Fresh Del Monte’s Q1 2026 misses EPS forecast By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/transcripts/earnings-call-transcript-fresh-del-montes-q1-2026-misses-eps-forecast-93CH-4660171); [Fresh Del Monte forecasts 13%-15% 2026 net sales growth as Del Monte Foods adds $600M amid $40M-$45M cost pressure](https://www.msn.com/en-us/money/companies/fresh-del-monte-forecasts-13-15-2026-net-sales-growth-as-del-monte-foods-adds-600m-amid-40m-45m-cost-pressure/ar-AA22sPDr?ocid=finance-verthp-feeds).

**Gaps and Limitations**
Based on the provided findings, the following requested information could not be verified:
*   **CEO/Leadership Changes:** No information was provided regarding CEO succession or executive leadership changes within the last 12 months.
*   **New Product Launches:** Aside from the transfer of existing brands (College Inn, Kitchen Basics, S&W), no specific new product launches or platform expansions were detailed.
*   **Manufacturing Growth:** No production or manufacturing *growth* rates or capacity expansions were found; the findings only detail plant and warehouse closures due to bankruptcy.
*   **Company Scale:** Specific employee counts and Fortune rankings were not present in the provided data.
